items.title: Inside this council's failed campaign to sell the four-day work week

children.content: It wanted to be the first Australian council to usher in a four-day work week. Documents show there was never a standalone business case to back the proposal — but there was a tight grip on messaging.

items.title: Greens sound alarm after salmon farm uses tonnes of antibiotics in waterway
